testcase.name: CV Generation Flow - Visual Test › Full user journey with screenshots
testcase.system-out:
🚀 Starting visual flow test...
📸 Step 1: Loading homepage... ✅ Homepage screenshot saved
📸 Step 2: Navigating to login... ✅ Login page screenshot saved
📸 Step 3: Filling login form... ✅ Login form filled
📸 Step 4: Submitting login... ✅ Post-login screenshot saved
Current URL: https://www.mycvbuddy.com/dashboard
📸 Step 5: On dashboard - navigating to upload... 📸 Step 6: On upload page... 📤 Uploading CV file... ✅ Upload complete screenshot saved
📸 Step 8: Results page... ✅ Results screenshot saved
🔍 UI Elements Check: Edit button visible: false Download button visible: false
📸 Step 9: Final dashboard view... ✅ Final dashboard screenshot saved
🎉 Visual flow test complete! 📸 All screenshots saved in ./screenshots/

testcase.name: CV Generation Flow - Visual Test › Quick visual check of key pages
testcase.system-out:
⚠️ Broken image: /graph.png
📊 Visual Check Results: Images: 1 total, 1 broken Buttons: 0 total, 0 without text Horizontal overflow: No ✅
